text: The department, as a condition of probation, may require a person whose privilege to operate a motor vehicle is subject to suspension or revocation to attend, for not to exceed 24 hours, the program authorized by the provisions of Section 1659.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 3. Investigation and Hearing [13800 - 14401]
#### Article 4. Probation [14250 - 14253]
##### § 14250.5

The department, as a condition of probation, may require a person whose privilege to operate a motor vehicle is subject to suspension or revocation to attend, for not to exceed 24 hours, the program authorized by the provisions of Section 1659.

*(Added by Stats. 1965, Ch. 447.)*
